entityTypes.name: prw_findings
entityTypes.description: Per-PR review-state snapshot from a single run: author classification, review status, and hours open against the SLA

pr_url.description: Full URL of the pull request

author_login.description: GitHub login of the PR author

ai_authored.description: Whether the author login matched an AI-author pattern

has_human_review.description: Whether at least one review came from a non-AI-pattern login

hours_open.description: Hours since the PR was opened, no human review

sla_status.description: ok = under half the SLA window; stale = past half with no human review; breach = past the full window with no human review

checked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp this snapshot was taken

entityTypes.name: receipts
entityTypes.description: Structured audit trail of automated actions taken by workspace agents, read by the receipts/team-health dashboard

kind.description: Always "receipt" — distinguishes this record from any other entity type

value.description: Numeric magnitude of the action — see unit

subject.description: What the action was about — a PR URL or other reference

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the action happened

agentSlug.description: The bot's marketplace slug that performed the action, e.g. "pr-watchdog"
